events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to assess compliance for a commercial project: PVC expansion fitting omitted on long exterior run. The work is rough-complete. Reference: NEC Art. 344 (Rigid Metal Conduit) and 352 (Rigid Polyvinyl Chloride Conduit). The scenario: PVC expansion fitting omitted on long exterior run. This is a violation of NEC 352.44, which requires expansion fittings for PVC conduit where the length change due to temperature variation is anticipated. Exterior runs are subject to temperature changes, so omission is non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: medium? Could be high if conduit pulls apart, but it's rough-complete, so can be corrected. Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: installed-defective (missing required fitting), non-compliant. Percent complete: maybe 90%? Rough-complete means installed but not closed out, so maybe 90%? Value: 0. Sound source: not applicable. Confidence: high. Event time, rate, order, workable: not needed. Findings: "PVC expansion fitting omitted on long exterior run, violating NEC 352.44." Actions: "Install expansion fitting(s) as required by code and manufacturer instructions." Rationale: "NEC 352.44 requires expansion fittings for PVC conduit where significant length change is expected; exterior runs are subject to temperature variations." References: ["NEC 352.44"]. So JSON.
